scope: ACL 2027 main PDF page 10 ethical-considerations disclosure wording

source_changes.change: Replaced process-heavy AI coding/writing/image-generation wording with a concise AI-based tools disclosure, author-responsibility statement, and explanatory-roadmap evidence boundary.

visual_review.finding: The page-10 layout remained stable after the disclosure rewrite: Figure 4 stayed at the top, the ethical-considerations paragraph stayed within the left column, references began in the right column, and no page-count change occurred.
old_visible_terms_removed: AI coding, writing, and image-generation assistants
visual_review.required_disclosure_retained: AI-based development and manuscript-support tools were used, with authors retaining responsibility for study design, evidence selection, claims, citations, and final text.

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|Rerun to get|Warning:.*Label|Undefined references|multiply defined|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log || true

pdftotext paper/venues/acl27/build/main.pdf tmp/acl_main_visual_iter_20260606_round22_after/main.txt && rg -n -i "AI coding|coding, writing|image-generation|generated schematic|schematic method-chain|teaching artifact|author-produced|record-derived" tmp/acl_main_visual_iter_20260606_round22_after/main.txt paper/venues/acl27/sections/ethical-considerations.tex || true

residual_risk: Focused main-paper page-10 public-wording polish only; not a supplement-wide production-wording cleanup or full final-upload audit.
